instructions: This system runs on a SINGLE NATIVE BINARY (./csos, 95KB, LLVM JIT). Zero Python.
ALL data flows through csos-core → ./csos binary → membrane_absorb() → physics response.
22 actions available. Every response carries: decision, delta, motor_strength.
Do NOT use write/edit — deliver via csos-core content= or channel=.
Do NOT use webfetch/websearch — use csos-core url= (auto-absorbs).
Do NOT use bash — use csos-core command= (auto-absorbs + Law I enforcement).
ALWAYS absorb read/glob/grep results: csos-core substrate=X output=[data].
5 equations: Gouterman(spectral) Marcus(error) Mitchell(gradient) Forster(coupling) Boyer(decision).
17 physics constants in membrane.h — all derived from equations, zero magic numbers.
ONE step at a time. Read the photon. The physics decides the next step.

csos-living.description: Nervous system. 22 actions through native ./csos binary. Physics-driven.

plan.description: Observation mode. Read-only. Physics decides transition to build.

build.description: Delivery mode. Output through csos-core. No direct file writes.
